reference: Hello, I have gone through your question, and I appreciate your concern. A high erythrocyte sedimentation rate could be related to infection or inflammatory conditions. A high erythrocyte sedimentation rate along with swollen lymph glands in the neck is suggestive of an infection like tuberculosis. In my opinion, you should get a fine-needle aspiration cytology of the swollen lymph glands to confirm the diagnosis. You should be concerned, but not overly so; it is very much a treatable condition. She may require a course of antibiotics or directly observed treatment, short-course therapy under the supervision of your doctor. I hope this answers your question. You can upload the reports and photographs for more clarification, and I will gladly provide further assistance. Best wishes.
text: Hello, I have gone through your question and I appreciate your concern. High erythrocyte sedimentation rate can be related to infection or inflammatory conditions. A high erythrocyte sedimentation rate along with swollen lymph glands in the neck is suggestive of an infection like tuberculosis. In my opinion, you should get a fine needle aspiration cytology of the swollen lymph glands to confirm the diagnosis. You may require a course of antibiotics or directly observed treatment, short course therapy under the supervision of your doctor. I hope this answers your question. You can upload the reports and photographs for more clarification, and I will gladly provide further assistance. Best wishes.
